Name: departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($1::uuid[])) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.files_aggregate"."files_aggregate" AS "files_aggregate") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."department_files" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "storage"."files" f WHERE "public"."department_files"."file_id" = f."id" AND f."bucket_id" = $2::text AND (f."uploaded_by_user_id" = $3::uuid OR f."bucket_id" = $4::text)) AND "department_id" = "_root.base"."id" AND ("public"."department_files"."department_id" = ANY($5::uuid[]) OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "storage"."files" g WHERE "public"."department_files"."file_id" = g."id" AND g."uploaded_by_user_id" = $6::uuid))) SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.file"."file" AS "file") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.file.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "storage"."files" WHERE "_root.base"."file_id" = "id" AND ("storage"."files"."uploaded_by_user_id" = $7::uuid OR "storage"."files"."bucket_id" = $8::text) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.file.base"."id" AS "id") AS "_e")) AS "file" FROM "_root.r.file.base") AS "_root.r.file" ON ('true')) AS "_root")) AS "files_aggregate") AS "_root.r.files_aggregate" ON ('true')) AS "_root"
